title: Review action should fall back to Track when CCTV specialist loses signal
description: A live operations review action should keep ONYX moving in Tactical Track when the CCTV specialist signal drops before review can open.
author: zaks

specialist.name: cctv
specialist.detail: Primary CCTV uplink dropped during live review handoff.

expectedProjectionChanges.detail: Primary CCTV uplink dropped during live review handoff.

cctv.detail: Primary CCTV uplink dropped during live review handoff.

commandBrainSnapshot.headline: Tactical Track is the next move
commandBrainSnapshot.summary: One next move is staged in Tactical Track.
commandBrainSnapshot.advisory: CCTV specialist lost signal, so ONYX shifted the next move into Tactical Track while verification recovered.
commandBrainSnapshot.rationale: Scenario replay preserved a live command target and rerouted into Tactical Track once cctv specialist signal loss removed the original desk from immediate use.
contextHighlights: Track continuity absorbed the next move after CCTV signal loss.
Sequence replay still produced a live-ops target instead of hanging.
missingInfo: CCTV specialist signal recovery is still pending.
commandBrainSnapshot.followUpPrompt: Restore the cctv specialist signal and confirm the next verified update before reopening the blocked desk.

specialistAssessments.summary: CCTV specialist lost signal, so ONYX redirected the move into Tactical Track while verification recovered.
evidence: Deterministic specialist degradation injected at replay step.
